notes: Reviewed Wikimedia Commons/CC source manifest for the next production media batch. Do not commit downloaded images from Codex; Wikimedia sourceUrl values can be resolved automatically by the importer during a real import. Updated sourcing rule: target remains four images per outlet, but production-safe coverage must not be below two images; if fewer than two exact production-safe images import for an outlet, keep the outlet in the plan and fill missing slots later with documented generic non-documentary shopping/outlet visuals. Do not promote metadata until imported files are verified true WebP and expected dimensions.

sourceStrategy.exactSourcePolicy: Keep verified/importable exact Wikimedia Commons sources. Do not use random web images, official/operator images without documented permission, or unknown-provenance images for production.
sourceStrategy.fallbackPolicy: If fewer than 2 exact production-safe images are available or importable for an outlet, mark missing slots for future production-safe generic non-documentary shopping/outlet replacements; generic images must be project-owned, generated by/for the project, licensed, public-domain, or permission-granted, and metadata notes must state they are generic/non-documentary and not exact outlet depictions.
sourceStrategy.legacyPolicy: Do not delete unknown local legacy images for an outlet until safe replacements exist for that outlet; once safe replacements exist for a processed outlet, remove the unknown legacy images for that outlet.
sourceStrategy.metadataGate: Do not promote metadata or mark assets production-cleared until the actual imported files are verified true WebP and the expected dimensions.

reviewSummary.manifestDecision: Keep this manifest focused on exact Wikimedia Commons sources for import; do not split it now. Add generic replacement images in a separate future manifest after the generic assets and their provenance are ready.
